/usr/bin/cc -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libgo2_interface__python.so -o rosidl_generator_py/go2_interface/libgo2_interface__python.so CMakeFiles/go2_interface__python.dir/rosidl_generator_py/go2_interface/msg/_camera_gimbal_cmd_s.c.o CMakeFiles/go2_interface__python.dir/rosidl_generator_py/go2_interface/srv/_camera_mode_s.c.o CMakeFiles/go2_interface__python.dir/rosidl_generator_py/go2_interface/srv/_go2_modes_s.c.o CMakeFiles/go2_interface__python.dir/rosidl_generator_py/go2_interface/srv/_go2_light_s.c.o CMakeFiles/go2_interface__python.dir/rosidl_generator_py/go2_interface/srv/_go2_volume_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/mybotshop/build/go2_interface:/opt/ros/foxy/lib libgo2_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.8.so libgo2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcpputils.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
